_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Topic & Theme
criteria.description: The presentation includes the assigned subject matter and maintains a unified central idea.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speech makes no reference to the given subject.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The assigned subject is not integrated into the speech in an understandable way.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The assigned subject was integrated into the speech in a clear manner.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The assigned subject was integrated clearly and developed comprehensively across the entire speech, incorporating personal anecdotes.

criteria.name: Introduction
criteria.description: Present an opening segment for the presentation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presentation lacked an opening section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment was not delivered in an understandable fashion.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment was delivered clearly, and the subject matter was explained.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment was delivered clearly, the subject matter was explained, and a smooth shift into the main content of the speech was provided.

criteria.name: Supporting Information (Body)
criteria.description: Present factual and relevant details to back up claims.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presentation did not address a specific subject.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several subjects were introduced but lacked obvious links between them.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The main subjects were recognized, linked together, and substantiated across the entire presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The main subjects were recognized, linked together, and substantiated across the entire presentation, employing fluid transitions that effectively reinforced the core subject.

criteria.name: Conclusion
criteria.description: Deliver a strong closing statement that relates to the main subject and overall message.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presentation ended without a closing section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The closing statement was not delivered in an understandable manner.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A strong closing statement was delivered.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The closing statement establishes a link to the entirety of the presentation.

criteria.name: Speech Delivery (Pace)
criteria.description: Present the speech at a suitable speed, avoiding unnecessary verbal pauses, using varied facial expressions, maintaining excellent eye contact with judges, exhibiting good posture, projecting the voice, and showing self-assurance and composure.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker maintained an inconsistent rhythm that was either too quick or too slow, along with excessive use of verbal fillers.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker exhibited a distracting and uneven rhythm, accompanied by noticeable use of verbal fillers.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker maintained an appropriate rhythm with minimal use of verbal fillers.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker maintained a well-varied rhythm and eliminated verbal fillers, fully engaging the audience.

criteria.name: Speech Delivery (Facial Expressions/Eye Contact)
criteria.description: Present the speech at a suitable speed, avoiding unnecessary verbal pauses, using varied facial expressions, maintaining excellent eye contact with judges, exhibiting good posture, projecting the voice, and showing self-assurance and composure.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker does not establish eye contact or display a range of facial expressions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: There is minimal variation in facial expressions and/or limited eye contact.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker uses appropriate facial expressions and maintains eye contact.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker maintains appropriate eye contact, uses suitable facial expressions, and did not rely on notes.

criteria.name: Speech Delivery (Voice Projection)
criteria.description: Present the speech at a suitable speed, avoiding unnecessary verbal pauses, using varied facial expressions, maintaining excellent eye contact with judges, exhibiting good posture, projecting the voice, and showing self-assurance and composure.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker's voice lacks projection.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: There is minimal voice projection.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker uses appropriate voice projection.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker uses appropriate voice projection and clear articulation.

criteria.name: Speech Delivery (Self-Confidence, Poise, and Good Posture)
criteria.description: Present the speech at a suitable speed, avoiding unnecessary verbal pauses, using varied facial expressions, maintaining excellent eye contact with judges, exhibiting good posture, projecting the voice, and showing self-assurance and composure.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker failed to exhibit self-assurance, composure, or proper posture.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker demonstrated some self-assurance, composure, or proper posture.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker exhibited a high level of self-assurance, composure, and proper posture.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker exhibited a high level of self-assurance, composure, posture, and assertiveness.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capacity to provide effective responses to inquiries.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker does not answer questions, or their responses are entirely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker provides incomplete or unclear answers, indicating a limited grasp of the subject.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker responds accurately and clearly to most questions, demonstrating sufficient understanding.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker responds confidently with clear, accurate, and insightful answers that enhance the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: The execution aligns with the established guidelines: The presentation adhered to the assigned topic, no materials were left behind after the presentation, and the use of food, live animals, technology, visuals, or props was avoided.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) failed to adhere to the guidelines.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The execution aligns with the established guidelines: The presentation adhered to the assigned topic, no materials were left behind after the presentation, and the use of food, live animals, technology, visuals, or props was avoided.
